## Sift’s Color Palette & Usage

Primary - Tried & True

Sift Blue

**HEX** #2E69FF

**RGB** 46 105 255

**CMYK** 82 59 0 0

Black

**HEX** #000000

**RGB** 0 0 0

**CMYK** 0 0 0 100

White

**HEX** #FFFFFF

**RGB** 255 255 255

**CMYK** 0 0 0 0

Sift Navy

**HEX** #00124D

**RGB** 0 18 77

**CMYK** 100 77 0 70

Secondary - Sprinkles of New Colors

Uplift Pink

**HEX** #FF3B84

**RGB** 46 105 255

**CMYK** 82 59 0 0

Value Gold

**HEX** #FFCA36

**RGB** 255 202 54

**CMYK** 0 21 79 0

Excellence Mint

**HEX** #79F7C6

**RGB** 121 247 198

**CMYK** 51 0 20 3

Light Blue

**HEX** #EAF0FF

**RGB** 234 240 255

**CMYK** 8 6 0 0

Light Gray

**HEX** #F5F3F5

**RGB** 245 243 245

**CMYK** 0 1 0 4

## Our Typography

sift primary font

Inter

The go-to typeface for all things Sift

Subtitle

24 / Regular / 0% / 150%

Body Large

18 / Regular / 0% / 150%

Body Medium

16 / Regular / 0% / 150%

Body Default

14 / Regular / 0% / 150%

Body Default

16 / Bold / 4% / 150%

Caption Large

16 / Bold / 4% / 120%

Built with a single, intuitive console, Sift’s end-to-end solution eliminates the need for disconnected tools, single-purpose software, and incomplete insights that drain operational resources.

The Sift Platform does what other fraud tools cant, Our patented technology delivers connected data, adaptability, and intelligent automation to every aspect of risk operations.

Select Headline font

Titillium Web

Additional character for headlines and callouts

Heading 1

72 / Bold / 0% / 110%

Heading 2

52 / Bold / 0% / 115%

Heading 3

40 / Bold / 0% / 120%

Heading 4

24 / Semibold / 0% / 120%

The Sift Platform

Display font

Permanent Marker

Brings a stark contrast and a “can-do” attitude to our key messages

Heading 1

72 / Bold / 0% / 110%

Heading 2

52 / Bold / 0% / 115%

Heading 3

40 / Bold / 0% / 120%

## Trademarks

Sift Science Inc. (“Sift”) uses the terms and/or logos (“Sift Trademarks”) below as active trademarks in branding its products and services. The Sift brand is an important symbol of our mission to help everyone trust the Internet. We have registered or applied for registration of these trademarks in the United States and other countries around the world.
